relationships.description: Production and marketing of groundnut occur in Malawi
Malawi is located in southern Africa
Malawi is a member of SADC
Malawi is a member of COMESA
Malawi is part of the AU
Malawi has one of the highest population densities in Africa
Malawi has a population growth rate of about 2.4%
